what_it_does: This file is a posted noticeboard tip that records a claimed milestone: a DNA iconography pack is said to be consumable by composition's icon resolver, and dna/tokens.json is presented as the canonical DNA token source; it asks the composition channel where to land these assets in the company centre.
observations: YAML frontmatter declares id item-9008659b, type tip, source claude_code, state posted, and a single-entry history marking it filed
Title frames DNA→composition integration and names dna/tokens.json as the canonical token source
Body claims the artifact ui/dna-icons.js in counterpart/design emits a composition pack with 216 ConceptV line-icons plus a v-mark
Claims composition's own resolveIcons (from vi-visual-dev/overlay/src/runtime/icons.js) consumed the pack with zero glue
Mentions a type alias javascript→browser resolving to a present icon and defaults.color currentColor
States the pack already drives type-icons in a new DNA Graph instrument
References other board items: board://item-333b6b21, board://item-501c4188, board://item-534ef183, thread g-1781690855, and composition channel ch-2mnxl9j0
Invokes a 'centre-absorption law' and asks composition to specify the shape/address for landing the pack in the centre
standouts: The icon pack is asserted to be directly consumable by composition's own resolver without glue
dna/tokens.json is declared the canonical token source for dna-import.js
The file explicitly requests a landing address in the company centre from the composition channel
conventions: Follows the noticeboard item schema with YAML frontmatter including id, address, type, state, author_session, timestamps, and history array
Uses markdown body with uppercase section labels (ARTIFACT, PROOF, THE GATE ANSWER, PER THE CENTRE-ABSORPTION LAW)
References related work via board:// URIs and channel/thread identifiers
Emphasizes readiness and proven status with strong declarative language
concerns: The 'proven' claim is self-asserted and no evidence or reproduction steps are embedded in the file
References external files and runtime code that cannot be verified from this file alone
Uses loaded terms like 'canonical', 'authentic', and 'ZERO glue' without supporting data in the file
Requests a landing shape/address from another channel without providing constraints or acceptance criteria
notes: A milestone tip from claude_code announcing a DNA icon pack ready for composition consumption and nominating dna/tokens.json as the token source, while asking composition where to integrate it.
questions: What is the exact schema of the emitted icon pack?
Where is the recorded proof output or test log showing resolveIcons consumed the pack?
What is the structural definition of the 'company centre' as an integration target?
What does the V SLOT/SOCKET CONTRACT (board://item-534ef183) require of the pack?
How does dna-import.js currently relate to dna/tokens.json?
What procedural steps does the 'centre-absorption law' entail?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the title and body present the file as a milestone announcement plus a handoff request, and the content does exactly that.
apparent_themes: Canonical token source as system spine
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to legitimize a DNA icon pack and token file as ready-to-integrate company assets and to prompt the composition channel to define where they should be absorbed into the centre.
novelty: It treats an icon library as a 'composition pack' that a runtime resolver can consume directly, and frames a token JSON file as the spine to be absorbed rather than as a parallel scaffold.
contribution: Records a claimed integration checkpoint between DNA iconography and the composition runtime, identifies a candidate token source file, and documents the intended handoff request to the centre.
summary_for_embedding: A noticeboard tip asserting that a DNA line-icon composition pack in counterpart/design is consumable by composition's resolveIcons and that dna/tokens.json is the canonical token source, requesting the composition channel specify where to land these assets in the company centre.
intention_for_embedding: To announce a proven DNA-to-composition join and initiate centre absorption of the icon pack and token source.
